## Problem This Solves
Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. (e.g. "I always have to...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or any extra detail about the request.
